Products / Stabilisers / Carry Flow
Stabilisers

Carry Flow

Coated xanthan gum polymer for suspension, carrying power, and borehole cleaning in water-based drilling fluids.

Product Overview

The most-used polymer in drilling fluids

Carry Flow is a premium-grade coated xanthan gum (XG) polymer designed for use in water-based drilling fluids across HDD, waterwell, and mineral exploration applications. Its unique coating technology allows for clean, lump-free mixing through standard hopper systems.

Xanthan gum produces highly shear-thinning fluids — thick at rest to suspend cuttings and prevent settling, but thin under pump pressure for efficient circulation. This "gel at rest, flow when pumping" behaviour is what makes XG the backbone of almost every drilling fluid system.

Carry Flow is effective in freshwater, seawater, and brine environments, and is compatible with all Blick fluid products. It is the single most-used polymer in the Blick range and the foundation of most fluid programs.

Key Benefits

  • Superior cuttings suspension and transport
  • Coated powder for easy, lump-free mixing
  • Works in freshwater, seawater, and brine
  • Gels at rest, flows when pumping — holds cuttings in place
Technical Data

Specifications

AppearanceWhite to off-white powder
Specific Gravity1.6
Bulk Density800 kg/m³
Treatment Range1 to 6 kg/m³
Packaging15 kg pails

Sticky Clay
Sand, Gravel & Firm
Heavy Rock & Gravel
Large Diameter Sand/Rock
Non-Reactive (Large)
Score: 4 / 5

Waterwell

Sand
Reactive Clay
Heavy Lifting
Hole Cleaning (Foam)
Score: 2 / 4
Field Guide

Practical recommendations for building your fluid system around Carry Flow.

Companion Products

Carry Max
When standard carrying power isn't enough — heavy rock, gravel, and coarse sand
Stabilisers
Carry Foam
Low-velocity environments where foam-assisted cleaning is more efficient
Stabilisers
Max Bore (Wyo Ben)
The bentonite foundation — hole stability and filtration in sand and gravel
Bentonite

Operational Tips

  • Add Carry Flow slowly through the hopper — dumping causes lumps
  • Running without a recycler? Add Biocide 75 to prevent bacterial degradation
  • In heavy clay, pair with Clay Control before adding Carry Flow
  • Test your mix water hardness first — pre-treat with Soda Ash if needed

Running Carry Flow without a recycler? Your fluid will degrade faster. Add Biocide 75 (0.5 to 1 L/1000L) to prevent bacterial breakdown and extend system life.
